response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with well over the required 6 years of experience, demonstrating deep expertise in the primary TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. He brings exceptional strength in testing practices and architecture, and notably possesses the specific AI agent development experience requested, making him a standout candidate for this senior fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest frameworks
Secondary backend experience heavily leans towards DLang rather than Kotlin/Java
Very short tenure at his most recent position could warrant discussion
